subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! God bless thee! Thy letter hath reached the Wronged One, and He hath acknowledged the bounty and grace of God, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله درک یا مهدی قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و اعترف بعنایه الله و فضله واحدا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @justice and wrath of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
